name: Meridia Floor Lamp - FLL4057 - Black - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the captivating Meridia 64 inch black floor lamp, crafted from sturdy iron. This elegant piece combines functionality and design, enhancing any room it graces. The sleek black color blends seamlessly with diverse decor styles, offering both charm and versatility. Standing tall at 64 inches, it provides excellent lighting while its refined silhouette adds a touch of sophistication. Ideal for living rooms, bedrooms, or offices, the Meridia floor lamp serves as both a practical source of light and a stylish statement piece. Transform your ambiance with the Meridia iron floor lamp, where style meets utility in perfect harmony.
